offer: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, billing discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem: Inaccurate billing due to mismatched patient records.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 clinics with demo video
Community forums where clinics share tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for 1-3 records
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing patient data
